body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 

In preparation for a ClimaTimeSteppers refactor:
* Increased comprehensiveness and completeness of test suite
* Revamped structure of test suite to make logical separation of concerns (e.g., infrastructure vs convergence) clearer
* Added GPU and allocation tests (closes #114)
* Removed unnecessary ClimaCore dependence (closes #185)
* Aligned Buildkite pipeline with new test suite and removed redundant tests.
* Aligned JuliaFormatter with other repos (resulting in lots of formatting changes that change nothing functionally). ***The only functional changes are in `test/` and in `.buildkite`.***

The test revamped surface various convergence and allocation issues, to be addressed next (issue #393).


## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->

- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included

- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

title: Test suite revamp
